item.title: USB Drive Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Recovermac.us provides how to restore Mac data program that facilitates person to easily recreate accidentally lost and erased digital files and folders in no time by providing complete record of files once stored in your removable media drives. Versatile Mac data recovery USB drive software provides user option to automatically retrieve all files once stored on your removable drive memory or manually retrieve particular selected document data/multimedia files from list of found records. Advanced USB data recovery application revives all formats of digital files, music, images, songs, videos, documents, snaps and folders from removable media drives that have been formatted or reformatted on operating system other than Macintosh OSX like Windows. Proficient data recovery USB drive program at recovermac.us regenerates digital files and folders from pen drive storage providing simple to function graphical interface featured with absolute how to restore Mac support at every step of drive scanning and data restoration process for ease of operability of non-technical person. Advanced how to restore Mac software performs data retrieval on all type of USB removable media data storage devices supporting flash drive, jump drive storage, thumbnail storage media, pen drive, USB key drives and other similar devices. Affordable data recovery pen drive application for Mac OSX operating system recreates data files from removable media in case of virus infection, logical corruption, accidental deletions, undetectable devices, accidental format and many others.Features:* Mac USB drive data recovery software revives files from formatted/reformatted removable drives.* Data recovery pen drive program supports pen drives of all major USB media drive manufacturers.* How to restore Mac software provides simple to operate interface with complete support for ease.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Drive Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Recovermac.us provides how to restore Mac data program that facilitates person to easily recreate accidentally lost and erased digital files and folders in no time by providing complete record of files once stored in your removable media drives. Versatile Mac data recovery USB drive software provides user option to automatically retrieve all files once stored on your removable drive memory or manually retrieve particular selected document data/multimedia files from list of found records. Advanced USB data recovery application revives all formats of digital files, music, images, songs, videos, documents, snaps and folders from removable media drives that have been formatted or reformatted on operating system other than Macintosh OSX like Windows. Proficient data recovery USB drive program at recovermac.us regenerates digital files and folders from pen drive storage providing simple to function graphical interface featured with absolute how to restore Mac support at every step of drive scanning and data restoration process for ease of operability of non-technical person. Advanced how to restore Mac software performs data retrieval on all type of USB removable media data storage devices supporting flash drive, jump drive storage, thumbnail storage media, pen drive, USB key drives and other similar devices. Affordable data recovery pen drive application for Mac OSX operating system recreates data files from removable media in case of virus infection, logical corruption, accidental deletions, undetectable devices, accidental format and many others.Features:* Mac USB drive data recovery software revives files from formatted/reformatted removable drives.* Data recovery pen drive program supports pen drives of all major USB media drive manufacturers.* How to restore Mac software provides simple to operate interface with complete support for ease.

[read more]

Recovermac.us provides how to restore Mac data program that facilitates person to easily recreate accidentally lost and erased digital files and folders in no time by providing complete record of files once stored in your removable media drives. Proficient data recovery USB drive program at recovermac.us regenerates digital files and folders from pen drive storage providing simple to function graphical interface featured with absolute how to restore Mac support at every step of drive scanning and data restoration process for ease of operability of non-technical person. Advanced how to restore Mac software performs data retrieval on all type of USB removable media data storage devices supporting flash drive, jump drive storage, thumbnail storage media, pen drive, USB key drives and other similar devices. Affordable data recovery pen drive application for Mac OSX operating system recreates data files from removable media in case of virus infection, logical corruption, accidental deletions, undetectable devices, accidental format and many others.Features:* Mac USB drive data recovery software revives files from formatted/reformatted removable drives.* Data recovery pen drive program supports pen drives of all major USB media drive manufacturers.* How to restore Mac software provides simple to operate interface with complete support for ease.

item.title: Mac Mobile Phone Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Mobile Phone Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Mobile Phone Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Reliable Mac phone data recovery application helps user to completely get back mobile phone saved data in cost effective and affordable way. Recover Mac Data Mobile Phone software offers advantage to support all popular brands of mobile phone such as Sony Ericsson, Panasonic, BlackBerry, Philips, Nokia, Samsung, Motorola, LG and many brands. MAC mobile data rescue utility facilitates user to successfully get back missing or deleted data in minimal time without requiring special technical help. Reliable Mac data recovery software provides interactive graphical user interface helps user to easily understand working of the software and does not required any special technical skill or training to operate program. MAC mobile phone data recovery tool provides advantage to restore all types of lost data saved in various file extensions. Mac mobile phone recovery software helps user to easily revive all the lost files and folders deleted due to accidental deletion, human mistakes, virus infected phone memory card, crashed phone book memory or other similar reasons. www.recovermac.us provides advantage to operate the software easily on all popular and commonly used MAC operating systems. MAC mobile phone data recovery software program provides excellent solution to undelete all lost files and folders in an affordable and comprehensive way.Features:* Reliable Mac data recovery software is easy to operate and offers option to revive all deleted files and folders without any expert guidance.* Mac mobile phone recovery software is simple and secure tool to revive lost, music collection, video clips, contact numbers and other lost data.* MAC mobile phone data recovery tool provides user friendly GUI interface helps user to revive all lost data in professional and economical way.

[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Miui 14 Mod Redmi Note 12 Pro and Pro plus [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Miui 14 Mod Redmi Note 12 Pro and Pro plus [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: santoshhh000
item.itunes:summary:
Miui 14 Mod Redmi Note 12 Pro and Pro plus
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
It is a tool that flashes MemeUI Miui 14 mod for Redmi Note 12 pro/Pro +
Run
flash_all.bat - flash rom with format data
flash_all_except_storage.bat - flash rom without format data
flash_all_Rooted.bat - flash rom with format data and rooted with magisk

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
It is a tool that flashes MemeUI Miui 14 mod for Redmi Note 12 pro/Pro +

flash_all_except_storage.bat - flash rom without format data
flash_all_Rooted.bat - flash rom with format data and rooted with magisk

item.title: Sony Music [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Sony Music [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Sony Music
(Virtualization)
The Music application from Sony makes listening to your music files a wonderful experience. Import your music, arrange in playlists and just listen and enjoy. We optimize the sound and restrict the power used, so you can listen for as long as you want.

The Music application from Sony makes listening to your music files a wonderful experience. Import your music, arrange in playlists and just listen and enjoy. We optimize the sound and restrict the power used, so you can listen for as long as you want.

item.title: SD Card Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SD Card Retrieval Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
SD Card Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Company offers Mac memory card recovery application at recovermac.us that facilitates person to easily and securely reform digital media files and office documents once stored on your removable media storage drives lost accidentally due to logical corruption of MMC cards. Powerful and effective data recovery Mac memory card program provides most convenient graphical user interface for ease of novice person having complete manual guide throughout files scanning and restoration process so even non-technical user can also handle without requiring any special technical guidance. Efficient Mac memory card recovery software revives digital data and multimedia files from removable media storage cards of all major manufacturer brands of MMC cards including Samsung, Kingston, HP, Sony, Transcend, Cannon, Olympus, Toshiba and many others. Versatile memory card lost data recovery application at recovermac.us recreates pictures, music, images, videos and document data from all type of removable media storage drives including mini SD cards, MMC cards, secure digital cards, micro SD cards, memory stick duo and similar media devices. Mac memory card recover program provides user finest option for retrieving lost files and folders by allowing person to have preview of document and multimedia files in special preview pane before restoring data at specified memory location of Apple Macintosh computer machines. Digital data recovery memory card Mac software rescue lost files executing on all versions of Mac OSX like Mac 10.7, Mac 10.4, Mac 10.6, Mac 10.5 and others.Features:* Data recovery memory card software provides simple graphical interface with complete manual guide.* Removable media cards data rescue program supports inaccessible and virus corrupted memory cards.* Mac memory card recovery software revives crashed pictures, music, video and office document files.

[read more]
item.description:
SD Card Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Company offers Mac memory card recovery application at recovermac.us that facilitates person to easily and securely reform digital media files and office documents once stored on your removable media storage drives lost accidentally due to logical corruption of MMC cards. Powerful and effective data recovery Mac memory card program provides most convenient graphical user interface for ease of novice person having complete manual guide throughout files scanning and restoration process so even non-technical user can also handle without requiring any special technical guidance. Versatile memory card lost data recovery application at recovermac.us recreates pictures, music, images, videos and document data from all type of removable media storage drives including mini SD cards, MMC cards, secure digital cards, micro SD cards, memory stick duo and similar media devices. Mac memory card recover program provides user finest option for retrieving lost files and folders by allowing person to have preview of document and multimedia files in special preview pane before restoring data at specified memory location of Apple Macintosh computer machines. Digital data recovery memory card Mac software rescue lost files executing on all versions of Mac OSX like Mac 10.7, Mac 10.4, Mac 10.6, Mac 10.5 and others.Features:* Data recovery memory card software provides simple graphical interface with complete manual guide.* Removable media cards data rescue program supports inaccessible and virus corrupted memory cards.* Mac memory card recovery software revives crashed pictures, music, video and office document files.

[read more]

SD Card Retrieval Software
(Utilities)
Company offers Mac memory card recovery application at recovermac.us that facilitates person to easily and securely reform digital media files and office documents once stored on your removable media storage drives lost accidentally due to logical corruption of MMC cards. Powerful and effective data recovery Mac memory card program provides most convenient graphical user interface for ease of novice person having complete manual guide throughout files scanning and restoration process so even non-technical user can also handle without requiring any special technical guidance. Efficient Mac memory card recovery software revives digital data and multimedia files from removable media storage cards of all major manufacturer brands of MMC cards including Samsung, Kingston, HP, Sony, Transcend, Cannon, Olympus, Toshiba and many others. Versatile memory card lost data recovery application at recovermac.us recreates pictures, music, images, videos and document data from all type of removable media storage drives including mini SD cards, MMC cards, secure digital cards, micro SD cards, memory stick duo and similar media devices. Mac memory card recover program provides user finest option for retrieving lost files and folders by allowing person to have preview of document and multimedia files in special preview pane before restoring data at specified memory location of Apple Macintosh computer machines. Digital data recovery memory card Mac software rescue lost files executing on all versions of Mac OSX like Mac 10.7, Mac 10.4, Mac 10.6, Mac 10.5 and others.Features:* Data recovery memory card software provides simple graphical interface with complete manual guide.* Removable media cards data rescue program supports inaccessible and virus corrupted memory cards.* Mac memory card recovery software revives crashed pictures, music, video and office document files.

item.title: Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program
(Utilities)
Has your precious photographs been lost or inaccessible as a result of a virus attack on storage media? Company will provide you convenient solution for this by presenting Mac photo recovery free software which capable in salvage of all missing photos and snapshots from memory card or damaged digital camera in simplified manner. With the help of Apple Mac digital picture recovery application all class of users efficiently rescue all important photographs and videos that clicks on various unforgettable moments with their family from logically corrupted camcorder. Rich quality Mac digital camera rescue software provides comprehensive and straight forward solution for recovery and restoration of corrupted birthday images, wedding video, baby audio and favorite pictures from any manufacturers brand handy cam in less span of time. Extraordinary featured digicam restoration utility for Mac successful brings back all inaccessible and damaged jpg, tiff, png or jpeg extensions pictures files from Mac trash. Innovative Mac photo recovery free software specially designed by suing various advance techniques that easily scan all corrupted or virus infected storage media to efficiently regain all digital pictures without any extra efforts.Features:* Mac photo recovery free software empower to restore all images even if any system generated error messages is pop up on Mac OS X installed machine while connecting digital camera.* Mac photo recovery free utility fully competent with different kinds of digital camera including Point and shoot camera, Specialty camera, Digital Video camera etc. * Mac digital camera recovery software developed with inbuilt disk scanning mechanism to find and rescue all missing images.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program
(Utilities)
Has your precious photographs been lost or inaccessible as a result of a virus attack on storage media? Company will provide you convenient solution for this by presenting Mac photo recovery free software which capable in salvage of all missing photos and snapshots from memory card or damaged digital camera in simplified manner. With the help of Apple Mac digital picture recovery application all class of users efficiently rescue all important photographs and videos that clicks on various unforgettable moments with their family from logically corrupted camcorder. Rich quality Mac digital camera rescue software provides comprehensive and straight forward solution for recovery and restoration of corrupted birthday images, wedding video, baby audio and favorite pictures from any manufacturers brand handy cam in less span of time. Extraordinary featured digicam restoration utility for Mac successful brings back all inaccessible and damaged jpg, tiff, png or jpeg extensions pictures files from Mac trash. Innovative Mac photo recovery free software specially designed by suing various advance techniques that easily scan all corrupted or virus infected storage media to efficiently regain all digital pictures without any extra efforts.Features:* Mac photo recovery free software empower to restore all images even if any system generated error messages is pop up on Mac OS X installed machine while connecting digital camera.* Mac photo recovery free utility fully competent with different kinds of digital camera including Point and shoot camera, Specialty camera, Digital Video camera etc. * Mac digital camera recovery software developed with inbuilt disk scanning mechanism to find and rescue all missing images.

[read more]

Digital Camera Video Retrieval Program
(Utilities)
Has your precious photographs been lost or inaccessible as a result of a virus attack on storage media? Company will provide you convenient solution for this by presenting Mac photo recovery free software which capable in salvage of all missing photos and snapshots from memory card or damaged digital camera in simplified manner. With the help of Apple Mac digital picture recovery application all class of users efficiently rescue all important photographs and videos that clicks on various unforgettable moments with their family from logically corrupted camcorder. Rich quality Mac digital camera rescue software provides comprehensive and straight forward solution for recovery and restoration of corrupted birthday images, wedding video, baby audio and favorite pictures from any manufacturers brand handy cam in less span of time. Extraordinary featured digicam restoration utility for Mac successful brings back all inaccessible and damaged jpg, tiff, png or jpeg extensions pictures files from Mac trash. Innovative Mac photo recovery free software specially designed by suing various advance techniques that easily scan all corrupted or virus infected storage media to efficiently regain all digital pictures without any extra efforts.Features:* Mac photo recovery free software empower to restore all images even if any system generated error messages is pop up on Mac OS X installed machine while connecting digital camera.* Mac photo recovery free utility fully competent with different kinds of digital camera including Point and shoot camera, Specialty camera, Digital Video camera etc. * Mac digital camera recovery software developed with inbuilt disk scanning mechanism to find and rescue all missing images.

[read more]
